meanings.definition: cut with sweeping strokes; as with an ax or machete
beat severely with a whip or rod
examples: The teacher often flogged the students
The feverish patient thrashed around in his bed

meanings.definition: patterned by having color applied with sweeping strokes; - Willa Cather
having long and narrow ornamental cuts showing an underlying fabric
examples: slashed cuffs showing the scarlet lining

meanings.definition: (used of rates or prices) reduced usually sharply
